panels.description: Medium shot: Elizabeth and Jonathan in a dimly lit, Victorian-style bedroom. Elizabeth is looking at Jonathan, holding his hand tightly; Jonathan has his arm protectively around her. Soft, melancholic lighting.

bubbles.text: I took the sleeping draught which you had so kindly given me, but for a long time it did not act.

panels.description: Close-up of Elizabeth's face, looking pale and weary. Jonathan is in the foreground, his back turned slightly as he grimaces in distress. Moody, dramatic shadows.

bubbles.text: Do not fret, dear. You must be brave and strong, and help me through the horrible task.

panels.description: Side profile of Elizabeth looking determined, holding a glass of medicine. Dim bedroom interior, warm lamplight flickering against the dark.

bubbles.text: Well, I saw I must try to help the medicine to its work with my will, if it was to do me any good, so I resolutely set myself to sleep.

panels.description: Wide shot of the bedroom at night. A strange, thin white mist begins to creep across the floor. Eerie, cold atmosphere.

bubbles.text: There was in the room the same thin white mist that I had before noticed.

panels.description: Dynamic low-angle shot: Elizabeth staring in terror at Jonathan, who is unnaturally fast asleep beside her. She is reaching out to shake his shoulder, but he remains motionless. Stark, fearful lighting.
